figures.caption: Table 2. Variance components and broad-sense heritability (H²) estimates for vegetative architecture 304 traits in cultivated Northern Wild Rice (Zizania palustris L.); variance components were estimated using 305 a linear mixed-effects model with year and population as random effects. Genetic variance represents 306 variance attributable to population, environmental variance includes year and residual components, and 307 phenotypic variance is the total observed variance. Broad-sense heritability (H²) was calculated using 308 harmonic means to account for unbalanced sampling across years and populations. Units are indicated for 309 each trait. 310
